title: How to Play ZXSnake
seoTitle: How to Play ZXSnake | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how to play ZXSnake, collect food, grow your snake, avoid collisions, and achieve higher scores.

images.caption: Guide your snake, collect food, and survive for as long as possible.

sections.heading: How to Play ZXSnake
paragraphs: Guide your snake around the arena, collect food to grow longer, and avoid collisions with walls, obstacles, and your own tail.
The longer you survive, the higher your score becomes. Every game is another opportunity to improve your reactions and beat your personal best.

featureShowcases.heading: Start Your First Game
featureShowcases.summary: Everything you need to begin playing ZXSnake with confidence.
body: ZXSnake is easy to learn but rewarding to master. Begin by collecting food, growing your snake, and planning your route ahead to avoid collisions.
As your confidence grows, you'll unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher scores on the leaderboards.

image.caption: Everything you need to begin your ZXSnake adventure.

summary: Guide your snake, collect food, survive longer, and improve your score with every game.
